calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances on Thursday, June 12, 2008: Michael Sherwood Rossoff, attorney for plaintiff Northridge Cooperative Homes, a California Corporation; Dwenda Hall, representative, appearing on behalf of plaintiff; Amir Nasshi, limited scope attorney for defendant Rhonda Lewis, who is also present

Settlement conference held. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which is not filed with the Court this day. The June 16, 2008 trial date is vacated. Judge Pro Tem Guy Stilson, Clerk L. Fong, not reported (218)
